$purpose: Single source of truth for all deprecated tools, endpoints, services, skills, patterns, and conventions across the arifOS Federation. Agents MUST consult this before using any tool or endpoint. Updated whenever something is deprecated, migrated, or decommissioned.
$rule: If a tool/endpoint/pattern IS in this registry → use the migration_path, not the deprecated item. If a tool/endpoint/pattern is NOT in this registry but seems stale → escalate as HOLD, do not use blindly.

mcp__arifos__forge_*.migration: Use mcp__aforge__forge_* instead. Connect to https://forge.arif-fazil.com/mcp.
mcp__arifos__forge_*.reason: Role separation: arifOS governs/judges, A-FORGE engineers. forge_* on arifOS is a deprecated proxy forwarding to A-FORGE.
mcp__arifos__forge_*.blast_radius: Any mutation attempted via deprecated proxy may fail or lack proper A-FORGE governance.

mcp__arifos__arif_judge_deliberate.migration: Use mcp__aforge__forge_judge_proxy on A-FORGE. Deliberation ported into AAA a2a-server.
mcp__arifos__arif_judge_deliberate.reason: APEX absorbed into AAA. Deterministic F1-F13 deliberation() now lives in AAA a2a-server.

mcp__arifos__mcp_health_check.reason: Health checking consolidated under WELL organ.

mcp__arifos__arif_triage.migration: OutputSchema validation may fail with FastMCP 3.4.2. Use with caution. Fix pending.

mcp__arifos__arif_measure.migration: OutputSchema validation may fail with FastMCP 3.4.2. Use with caution. Fix pending.

mcp__arifos__arif_route.migration: OutputSchema validation may fail with FastMCP 3.4.2. Use with caution. Fix pending.

mcp__arifos__arif_forge.migration: Use mcp__aforge__forge_execute on A-FORGE port 7072. arif_forge is a legacy proxy from pre-Brain/Hands split.
mcp__arifos__arif_forge.reason: Role separation: arifOS governs/judges, A-FORGE engineers. arif_forge predates the split.

mcp__arifos__arif_forge_execute.reason: Same as arif_forge. Legacy pre-split execute proxy.

mcp__arifos__arif_critique.migration: Use arif_think(mode='critique') or arif_heart_critique. arif_critique predates the unified thinking pipeline.
mcp__arifos__arif_critique.reason: Zen: arif_critique vs arif_heart_critique naming inconsistency. Critique folded into arif_think.

mcp__arifos__arif_memory.migration: Use arif_vault_query for reading. Use arif_seal for writing. arif_memory overlaps with vault query.
mcp__arifos__arif_memory.reason: Zen: arif_memory vs arif_memory_recall naming inconsistency. Memory functions consolidated into vault.

mcp__arifos__arif_memory_recall.migration: Use arif_vault_query for reading vault records.
mcp__arifos__arif_memory_recall.reason: Zen: duplicate memory tool. Vault query is the canonical read path.

mcp__arifos__arif_fetch.reason: Zen: arif_fetch vs arif_evidence_fetch unclear distinction. Both folded into arif_observe.

mcp__arifos__arif_evidence_fetch.reason: Zen: same as arif_fetch. Both consolidated into arif_observe.

mcp__arifos__arif_measure.migration: OutputSchema validation may fail with FastMCP 3.4.2. Use arif_ops_measure or arif_observe(mode='vitals') instead.
mcp__arifos__arif_measure.reason: Pre-existing FastMCP incompatibility + zen naming overlap with arif_ops_measure.

mcp__arifos__hermes_system_status.migration: These 6 Hermes tools (hermes_system_status, hermes_epistemic_check, hermes_fact_check, hermes_cross_verify, hermes_plan_review, hermes_memory_steward) should migrate to a dedicated Hermes MCP server.
mcp__arifos__hermes_system_status.reason: Zen: Hermes-domain tools should not live in arifOS kernel MCP. They leak Telegram agent operations into the constitutional surface.

mcp__arifos__hermes_epistemic_check.reason: Part of 6 Hermes tools that should move out of arifOS kernel.

mcp__arifos__hermes_fact_check.reason: Part of 6 Hermes tools that should move out of arifOS kernel.

mcp__arifos__hermes_cross_verify.reason: Part of 6 Hermes tools that should move out of arifOS kernel.

mcp__arifos__hermes_plan_review.reason: Part of 6 Hermes tools that should move out of arifOS kernel.

mcp__arifos__hermes_memory_steward.reason: Part of 6 Hermes tools that should move out of arifOS kernel.

mcp__geox__pattern_a_wrappers.migration: GEOX has Pattern A wrapper tools (geox_claim, geox_evidence) that overlap with EGS granular tools. Use EGS tools for detailed operations, Pattern A for unified access.
mcp__geox__pattern_a_wrappers.reason: Zen: Pattern A vs EGS overlap creates 3+ tool pairs doing similar things.

mcp__geox__egs_seismic_compute.reason: Zen: geox_seismic_compute is the unified canonical tool. geox_egs_seismic_compute is redundant.

mcp__well__well_system_registry_status.reason: Zen: WELL has TWO registry tools. well_registry_status is canonical.

mcp__aforge__forge_browser.migration: Use chrome-devtools MCP as canonical browser interface. 3 concurrent browser systems exist (forge_browser_*, chrome-devtools, playwright).
mcp__aforge__forge_browser.reason: Zen: 3-way browser overlap. chrome-devtools is canonical.

mcp__aforge__forge_search.reason: Zen: redundant wrapper around Brave. 17→7 search surface. Canonical: mcp_brave_search.

mcp__aforge__forge_research.reason: Zen: redundant wrapper around Perplexity. 17→7 search surface. Canonical: hermes mcp_perplexity_*.

mcp__hermes__web_extract.reason: Zen: Tavily API is DEAD (402). forge_web_extract is the replacement.

mcp__hermes__mcp_perplexity_search.migration: Use mcp_brave_search for raw results. Use mcp_perplexity_ask for AI-synthesized answers.
mcp__hermes__mcp_perplexity_search.reason: Zen: redundant with mcp_brave_search. 17→7 search surface.

mcp__geox__geox_surface_status.migration: Consider renaming to geox_system_registry_status for naming consistency with WEALTH (wealth_system_registry_status) and WELL (well_registry_status).

mcp__arifos__arif_ops_measure.migration: Use arif_observe(mode='vitals') or forge_health_check for system metrics.
mcp__arifos__arif_ops_measure.reason: Zen: naming overlap with arif_measure. Ops metrics consolidate under arif_observe.

mcp__arifos__arif_session_init.migration: Use mcp__arifos__arif_init instead. arif_session_init is a legacy SDK alias — behavior is identical, only the name differs. New calls MUST use arif_init.
mcp__arifos__arif_session_init.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: SDK alias creates naming confusion. arif_init is canonical per AGENTS.md heptalogy.

mcp__aforge__forge_systemctl.migration: Use mcp__aforge__forge_shell(mode='command', command='systemctl ...') instead. forge_systemctl is a deprecated thin wrapper.
mcp__aforge__forge_systemctl.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: forge_systemctl marked [DEPRECATED] in its own tool description. forge_shell is the canonical shell primitive.

mcp__wealth__wealth_monte_carlo.migration: Use mcp__wealth__wealth_monte_carlo_simulate instead. Identical behavior, canonical name.
mcp__wealth__wealth_monte_carlo.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: legacy alias. wealth_monte_carlo_simulate is the canonical tool.

mcp__wealth__wealth_emv_compute.migration: Use mcp__wealth__wealth_compute_emv instead. Identical behavior, canonical name.
mcp__wealth__wealth_emv_compute.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: legacy alias. wealth_compute_emv is the canonical tool.

mcp__wealth__wealth_evoi_compute.migration: Use mcp__wealth__wealth_compute_evoi instead. Identical behavior, canonical name.
mcp__wealth__wealth_evoi_compute.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: legacy alias. wealth_compute_evoi is the canonical tool.

mcp__wealth__wealth_reason_agent.migration: Use mcp__wealth__wealth_agent_path instead. Identical behavior, canonical name.
mcp__wealth__wealth_reason_agent.reason: Fitness audit 2026-07-05: legacy alias. wealth_agent_path is the canonical tool.

mcp__geox__geox_seismic_ingest.reason: Seismic consolidation: merged into unified seismic_compute explorer.

mcp__geox__geox_seismic_interpret.reason: Seismic consolidation: merged into unified seismic_compute explorer.

mcp__well__well_guard_dignity.reason: Dignity tools pruned per constitutional alignment (reflection only).

certbot-renew.timer.migration: Caddy uses Cloudflare Origin CA + auto HTTPS. Certbot not needed.

openclaw-a2a.service.reason: Dead adapter — NameError. Service file deleted.

apex.arif-fazil.com.migration: Routes to AAA:3001. Caddy block commented out.

https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/mcp (forge.migration: Use https://forge.arif-fazil.com/mcp for all forge_* tools.

non_date_tags.reason: Date-stamp tags are iron rule. The forge date IS the version. Existing cikai tags (v55.*, v0.1.*) are legacy — do not replicate.

containerize_core_organs.migration: Core organs (arifOS, A-FORGE, GEOX, WEALTH, WELL, AAA) run bare-metal systemd. Only supporting services (Postgres, Redis, Qdrant, Graphiti, Temporal) run in Docker.
containerize_core_organs.reason: Docker Doctrine: core organs are not containers.

hardcode_api_keys.migration: All secrets in /root/.secrets/vault.env. Reference via env vars, never hardcode.
hardcode_api_keys.reason: F1 AMANAH: secret exposure is irreversible.

openclaw-a2a-bridge (v0.1.0).migration: Use canonical A2A gateway on OpenClaw GW (port 18789).
openclaw-a2a-bridge (v0.1.0).reason: Legacy bridge. Canonical A2A mesh is live.

gemini_workspace_tools.migration: Google Workspace moved to private peripheral adapter. No longer in arifOS core.
gemini_workspace_tools.reason: Kernel Purity Seal — arifOS core only contains constitutional tools.

wealth_hidden_aliases.migration: WEALTH has 20 public tools (+34 hidden aliases, 65 decorators). Use only the 20 public tools. Hidden aliases are backward-compat only.

zen_issues.$note: These are NOT deprecations — they are tool-zen issues identified in the 2026-06-28 audit. They represent naming inconsistencies, organizational drift, and simplification opportunities. Listed here until resolved or formally deprecated.

arifos_hermes_6_tools.description: 6 Hermes tools leak into arifOS MCP surface (hermes_system_status, hermes_epistemic_check, hermes_fact_check, hermes_cross_verify, hermes_plan_review, hermes_memory_steward). Should migrate to dedicated Hermes MCP server.

arifos_arif_forge_legacy.description: arif_forge and arif_forge_execute are legacy pre-Brain/Hands split proxies. A-FORGE forge_execute is canonical.

geox_pattern_a_vs_egs.description: GEOX has 3+ pairs of overlapping tools: geox_claim vs egs_claim_create, geox_evidence vs egs_evidence_attach, geox_seismic_compute vs egs_seismic_compute. Pattern A wrappers vs EGS granular.

well_double_registry.description: WELL exposes both well_registry_status and well_system_registry_status. Two tools doing the same thing.

registry_naming_inconsistency.description: GEOX uses geox_surface_status, WEALTH uses wealth_system_registry_status, WELL uses well_registry_status + well_system_registry_status. Inconsistent naming.

three_browser_systems.description: 3 concurrent browser tool systems: forge_browser_*, chrome-devtools MCP, playwright MCP. chrome-devtools is canonical.

arifos_naming_inconsistencies.description: arif_critique vs arif_heart_critique, arif_memory vs arif_memory_recall, arif_measure vs arif_ops_measure, arif_fetch vs arif_evidence_fetch. Multiple naming inconsistencies in arifOS.

aforge_registry_empty.description: forge_registry returns 0 registered tools. APEX Decision Field registry is empty — all forge_* tools come from static registration, not the dynamic APEX system.

minimax_accept_header.description: MiniMax MCP servers :18090/:18091 reject single Accept header. Require 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream'. Inconsistent with other organs.

stages.ANNOUNCED: Deprecation declared. Old item still works but emits warning.
stages.DEPRECATED_PROXY: Old item forwards to new canonical. Use new directly.
stages.STOPPED_DISABLED: Service stopped and disabled. Will not restart on boot.
stages.REMOVED: Gone. Do not reference. Do not resurrect.

cleanup_checklist: 3. Update CLAUDE.md if the deprecated item was referenced there
4. Update hooks if the deprecated item was in hook config
5. Update skills if the deprecated item was in skill instructions
6. Wait one session before REMOVED status (F1 AMANAH: reversible window)
7. After removal, grep codebase for residual references and clean up
